-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT identifier FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier::int DESC LIMIT 1

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade AS geometry FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade WHERE kartleggingstatus = 'Gjennomført' AND ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '5001'))

1.description: retrieve Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: identify highest risk class identifier for quick-clay hazard

3.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by high risk class and Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: retrieve buildings filtered by Trondheim kommunenummer

5.description: identify buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker
